Interface IExecutionMethodReturnValue

All Superinterfaces:
IExecutionElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
ExecutionMethodReturnValue, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodReturnValue
public interface IExecutionMethodReturnValue extends IExecutionElement

A return value of an IExecutionMethodReturn.

The default implementation is ExecutionMethodReturnValue which is instantiated via a ExecutionMethodReturn instances.

See Also:
  • ExecutionMethodReturn
  • ExecutionMethodReturnValue

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    JTerm
    getCondition()
    Returns the optional condition under which the return value is valid.
    String

    Returns the optional condition under which the return value is valid as human readable String.

    getReturnValue()
    Returns the return value.
    String

    Returns the return value as human readable String.
    boolean

    Checks if a condition is available via getCondition() under which this return value is returned.

    • hasCondition

      boolean hasCondition() throws ProofInputException
      Checks if a condition is available via getCondition() under which this return value is returned.
      Returns:
      true condition is available, false condition is not available.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException
